title: fix: repair dead brand links + complete official link collection
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Fixes dead links in the official social brand link collection (`social/prompts/brand/links.md`) and rounds it out.

- Fix `hello.pollinations.ai` (DNS gone post-migration) → `pollinations.ai` — Main Website + App Showcase
- Fix `react-hooks.pollinations.ai` (SSL cert mismatch, broken) → live `react.pollinations.ai`; same broken link also fixed in `README.md`
- Add missing published npm packages: `@pollinations/ui`, `@pollinations/cli` (collection only had sdk + mcp)
- Add BYOP and first-party MCP server docs links
- Add `media.pollinations.ai` content-addressed media store

Verified: pollinations.ai, react.pollinations.ai, media.pollinations.ai, both docs tags all return 200; ui/cli confirmed on the npm registry.

gist.headline: Signposts updated
gist.blurb: We've polished up our official link collection, fixing a few broken URLs and adding our UI and CLI npm packages to the map. All paths lead to the right flowers now.
gist.summary: Updated the official brand link collection and README to fix dead URLs (routing hello.pollinations.ai to pollinations.ai and react-hooks to react) while adding missing @pollinations/ui, @pollinations/cli, and media store links.
gist.impact: Developers and internal tools now have a fully accurate, 200-OK verified map of all official Pollinations resources and packages.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and monitor robot repairing and updating wooden signposts in a cozy garden, representing the fixing of URLs and adding new destinations.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, hammering a new wooden signpost in a digital garden. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head stands nearby holding a map. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
